conversation.text: Our agent cannot receive calls on the CINNOX platform.
I'd be happy to help! Could I get your company name and Account ID to pull up your account?
Yes, I'm an existing customer. Company is Pacific Bank HK.
Thank you! Could you also provide your **Account ID** so I can pull up your account?

Got it, thank you! I've pulled up your account — **Pacific Bank HK (PBHK-2024)**.

To help our support team resolve this quickly, could you let me know:
1. **Which service number** is affected?
2. **Which agent(s)** are unable to receive calls?

Thank you for the details. Let me escalate this to our support team right away.I'm connecting you with our support team now. They'll be with you shortly.

*(Case summary passed to support: Pacific Bank HK | Account: PBHK-2024 | Agent: Alice | Service number: +852-1234-5678 | Issue: Unable to receive calls)*
